_comment: MCP server configuration template for the sovereign-os repo. Copy to '.mcp/config.json' (gitignored) and fill in operator-specific values. No secrets ship in this template.
_description: This template documents the MCP servers a developer / operator might want when working on sovereign-os. Sister projects (info-hub, selfdef, AICP) expose their own MCP servers; sovereign-os does not yet expose one of its own (Stage 2+ may add a lifecycle-management MCP per Q-019).

_info_hub._purpose: Reach the second-brain wiki for the SAIN-01 architectural baseline, 11 epics, L1-L3 syntheses, comparisons, and operator-directive verbatim provenance.
_info_hub._invocation: OPERATOR FILLS IN — typically the info-hub repo's MCP server entry per its own README. See https://github.com/cyberpunk042/devops-solutions-information-hub

_selfdef._purpose: Reach the selfdef daemon's runtime introspection / module-helper APIs (optional; only relevant when working on the selfdef-on-SAIN-01 integration once Stage 2 opens).

_aicp._purpose: Reach AICP (devops-expert-local-ai) for inference + research workflows. Particularly relevant for Q-017 (inference-backend stack) evaluation when that SDD opens, and possibly for Q-019 (lifecycle management) integration.

_github._purpose: GitHub MCP for cross-repo PR / issue management. Same MCP the agent uses to interact with this repo.
_github._invocation: OPERATOR-MANAGED — typically installed at the user level, not per-repo
_github._note: Not configured at the repo level; this entry is documentation-only.

_notes: Underscore-prefixed keys are documentation-only and should be stripped when authoring the actual .mcp/config.json (which is gitignored).
Lifecycle-management MCP for sovereign-os itself is a Q-019 question; if/when that SDD opens, this template gets a real entry.
Secrets (API tokens, etc.) MUST NOT live in this template or its .json counterpart — use env vars per the IaC bar.
